meta.homeTitle: MeowDecoder — Analyze and interpret your cat's vocalizations
meta.homeDescription: Feline acoustic analysis platform. Record or upload a sound and find out whether your cat is meowing, purring, hissing or yowling, with honest contextual interpretation.
meta.analyzeDescription: Record or upload audio and get a classification of your cat's vocalization with a confidence level.

home.heroTitle: Understand what your cat is trying to tell you
home.heroSubtitle: Record or upload a sound and get a clear acoustic analysis of its vocalization. No magic promises: an honest classification with its confidence level.
home.step1Body: Record with the microphone or upload an audio file. Processing happens on your device.
home.step2Body: We extract features from the sound — pitch, rhythm, texture — without your audio leaving the browser.
home.step3Body: You get the most likely vocalization, alternatives, and an interpretation of its context.
home.soundsSubtitle: Explore the feline vocalizations we recognize.
home.scienceBody: MeowDecoder is a vocalization classifier, not a literal translator. Feline bioacoustics research supports classification by type and approximate contextual interpretation, not word-for-word translation. When the signal is ambiguous, we tell you.
home.privacyNote: Your audio is processed locally and is not uploaded to any server unless you allow it.
home.accountCtaTitle: Create an account to save your cats' history
home.accountCtaBody: Sync your analyses across devices and keep each cat's corrections. Optional: the app works without an account.

analyze.title: Analyze a sound
analyze.recordHint: Tap to record your cat's sound. We'll ask for microphone permission.
analyze.uploadHint: Drag an audio file or select one (WAV, MP3, M4A).
analyze.keepAudio: Save the audio to my history
analyze.errorNoVocalization: We couldn't detect a clear vocalization. Try a closer recording or less background noise.
analyze.errorMicDenied: We don't have microphone permission. Enable it in your browser settings and retry.
analyze.errorGeneric: Something went wrong analyzing the audio. Please try again.
analyze.permissionExplain: We need microphone access only to record this sound. The audio is processed on your device.

result.title: Analysis result
result.ambiguousWarning: The signal is ambiguous. Treat this as guidance, not a certainty.
result.feedbackThanks: Thanks — your correction helps us improve.
result.feedbackShare: Share this audio to improve the model
result.notScience: This is an interpretive guide, not a veterinary diagnosis.

cats.title: My cats
cats.empty: You haven't added any cats yet. Creating a profile improves interpretation over time.
cats.name: Name
cats.confirmDelete: Delete this cat and its associated data?

meow.title: Feeders & dispensers
meow.desc: Make your cat's meal routines easier.

trill.title: Interactive toys
trill.desc: Stimulation and play for active cats.

common.errorBody: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again.
